description: A submit button for the site search form containing a Font Awesome search icon, used inside the .site-search form.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Search submit button with default aria-label

stories.name: CustomAriaLabel
stories.description: Search submit button with a custom aria-label

notes: The button contains a hardcoded Font Awesome icon (fas fa-search) and no visible text. The aria-label is always 'Site search' in observed samples but is modelled as a prop for flexibility. This component does not use a CSS class from the existing stylesheet — assign rootClassName 'search-submit-button' for local scoping. The button type is always 'submit' and should be hardcoded.
